summary: Executed backend pytest regression for Phase 1 additional features and frontend Playwright checks for Settings + Applications UI integrations. Core requested flows passed for disconnected Gmail preconditions, OAuth start behavior, direct-apply queue invocation path, proof-image detail fields, and follow-up draft/send guardrails.

critical.issue: Intermittent 500 observed in backend logs: wrap_lines expects string but receives dict from AI output path, causing AttributeError ('dict' object has no attribute 'split').

minor.issue: Returns 400 'Gmail is not connected.' when OAuth is not connected (expected in current environment).

integration_issues.issue: User sees error toast when Gmail is not connected (backend 400). UX is functional but depends on OAuth setup.

action_items: Harden document generation against non-string AI fields (coerce/validate tailored_resume and cover_letter before PDF rendering).

Fix scheduled 3-day follow-up query logic: current filter uses $exists:false but application docs initialize followup_sent_at/followup_draft_body as empty strings, which can block automatic due-followup generation.
Re-check direct-apply submit selector strategy to avoid non-application modal buttons (observed retries against remotive dead-link modal Submit button).
Run a full Gmail connected happy-path test with real OAuth credentials + mailbox to validate classifier-to-kanban mapping end-to-end.
critical_code_review_comments: run_job_discovery() calls get_profile() twice consecutively (duplicate DB fetch).

Retry cap semantics likely exceed intent: execute_direct_apply already retries 3 internal browser attempts, then queue-level retry_count allows up to 4 queue attempts (>3 check), amplifying total attempts.
Automatic follow-up scheduler filter likely dead-path due to $exists:false checks on fields that are always initialized in application records.
seed_data_creation: Used existing discovered jobs/applications in the shared environment; queued a direct-apply candidate and generated follow-up draft on an existing application.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend additional feature suite passed 9/9 at public endpoint. Gmail connected-path and classifier status updates were not validated due missing real OAuth/mailbox credentials. Frontend Settings and Applications controls are visible/clickable via data-testid selectors. One critical intermittent backend 500 was found in logs for generate-documents when AI output type is unexpected.
rca of the issue: RCA-1 (generate-documents 500): AI response parser may return a dict under keys expected as strings; create_text_pdf -> wrap_lines() assumes text and calls split(), causing AttributeError. Repro evidence in backend.err.log during POST /api/jobs/{id}/generate-documents. Mitigation: strict type guards and fallback string coercion before PDF generation. RCA-2 (auto follow-up scheduler miss): generate_due_followups filters followup_sent_at and followup_draft_body with $exists:false, but these fields are created as empty strings at application creation; due candidates can be skipped.
